title: hieracium laevigatum subsp. jutlandicum
intro: Hieracium laevigatum subsp. jutlandicum, also known as Jutland hawkweed, is a subspecies of perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the dandelion family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Jutland hawkweed include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal purposes, and it can also be used topically to treat wounds and skin conditions.
